zh.Askrigg, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾阿斯可利格
zh.Nappa, North Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾納帕
zh.Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾納帕 白 阿斯可利格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Metcalfe於1424年出生在英國越可爾納帕 白 阿斯可利格時，他的父親James Metcalfe36歲，母親Gelsone Gibson29歲。他於1455年與Elizabeth Hartlington在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1483年被列為chancellor of the duchy of lancaster。他去世於1504年7月23日在他的家鄉享年80歲，埋葬在英國越可爾納帕 白 阿斯可利格。

zh-hans.Askrigg, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾阿斯可利格
zh-hans.Nappa, North Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾納帕
zh-hans.Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾納帕 白 阿斯可利格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Metcalfe于1424年出生在英国越可爾納帕 白 阿斯可利格时，他的父亲James Metcalfe36岁，母亲Gelsone Gibson29岁。他于1455年与Elizabeth Hartlington在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1483年被列为chancellor of the duchy of lancaster。他去世于1504年7月23日在他的家乡享年80岁，埋葬在英国越可爾納帕 白 阿斯可利格。

nameMeanings.name: Metcalfe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Metcalf
meanings: English (Yorkshire): apparently a nickname from Middle English mete ‘meat, food’ + calf ‘calf’, i.e. ‘calf to be fattened up for eating’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Metcalfe was born in 1424, in Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, his father, James Metcalfe, was 36 and his mother, Gelsone Gibson, was 29. He married Elizabeth Hartlington in 1455, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1483, his occupation is listed as chancellor of the duchy of lancaster. He died on 23 July 1504, in his hometown, at the age of 80, and was buried in Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Metcalfe est né en 1424, à Nappa by Askrigg, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, James Metcalfe, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Gelsone Gibson, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hartlington en 1455, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1483, sa profession de son indiquée est chancellor of the duchy of lancaster. Il est décédé le 23 juillet 1504, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Nappa by Askrigg, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Metcalfe 1424 in Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Metcalfe 36 und seine Mutter Gelsone Gibson 29. Er hat 1455 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Hartlington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1483 ist sein Beruf als chancellor of the duchy of lancaster aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. Juli 1504 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Metcalfe è nato il nel 1424 nel Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, James Metcalfe, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Gelsone Gibson, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hartlington nel 1455, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1483, la sua occupazione è indicata come chancellor of the duchy of lancaster. Morì il 23 luglio 1504, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England.

ja.from 7 July 1483 to 13 September 1486: から1483年7月7日まで1486年9月13日
ja.Askrigg, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアアスクリググ
ja.Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Nappa, North Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアナッパ
ja.Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアナッパ ビー アスクリググ
ja.Nappa, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアナッパ
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Metcalfeが1424年にイギリスヨークシュアイアナッパ ビー アスクリググで生まれた時，父James Metcalfeは36歳，母Gelsone Gibsonは29歳であった。1455年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでElizabeth Hartlingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1483年，職業はchancellor of the duchy of lancasterと記録されている。彼は1504年7月23日に故郷で80歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアナッパ ビー アスクリググにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Metcalfe(이)가 1424년 영국 요르크실르 나파 비 아스크리그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Metcalfe(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Gelsone Gibson(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Elizabeth Hartlington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1483년, 그의 직업은 chancellor of the duchy of lancaster이었다. 그는 1504년 7월 23일 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 나파 비 아스크리그에 묻혔다.

pt.from 7 July 1483 to 13 September 1486: de 7 de julho de 1483 a 13 de setembro de 1486
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Metcalfe nasceu em 1424, em Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Metcalfe, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Gelsone Gibson, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hartlington em 1455, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1483, sua profissão aparece como chancellor of the duchy of lancaster. Ele faleceu em 23 de julho de 1504, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Metcalfe родился в 1424 г. в местности наппа би аскриг, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени James Metcalfe было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gelsone Gibson, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hartlington в 1455 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1483 году он работал по профессии chancellor of the duchy of lancaster. Он умер 23 июля 1504 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности наппа би аскриг, еркшир, Англия.

es.from 7 July 1483 to 13 September 1486: desde 7 de julio de 1483 hasta 13 de septiembre de 1486
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Metcalfe nació en 1424, en Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James Metcalfe, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Gelsone Gibson, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hartlington en 1455, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1483, su ocupación registrada era chancellor of the duchy of lancaster. Murió el 23 de julio de 1504, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
